use_cases: Animated background or hero element for creative portfolios and landing pages
Data visualization component showing directional flow patterns for analytics dashboards
Interactive canvas art installation for media and entertainment websites
Dynamic visual element for dev-tools documentation or API visualization pages
Generative art component for creative coding experiments and tools
ai_summary: A Canvas-based animated vector field visualization that renders a grid of rotating directional arrows with configurable density, speed, and distribution. The component uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth 60fps animation and supports parameters for grid size, vector length, rotation speed, and locked point probability. Designed as a decorative or data visualization element for creative web applications, landing pages, and interactive backgrounds.
